narrative:
Hill 5-B (precinct in Franklin County) has 1,326 registered voters, with 57.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.3%, a narrow Republican lean of 0.4 percentage points.
